Class ConfigBusiness

java.lang.Object
lcr.business.ConfigBusiness
public class ConfigBusiness extends Object
Controller class responsible for managing and applying hardware configuration parameters sequentially to the LCR meter device. * @author sylkat

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyConfig(LcrMeter meter)
    Transmits and applies the current configuration sequence to the LCR meter hardware with necessary stabilization delays.
    ConfigDTO
    getCurrentConfig()
    Retrieves the current local configuration parameters.
    void
    setConfiguration(ConfigDTO config)
    Sets the local configuration parameters.

    • setConfiguration

      public void setConfiguration(ConfigDTO config)
      Sets the local configuration parameters. * @param config the configuration data transfer object

    • getCurrentConfig

      public ConfigDTO getCurrentConfig()
      Retrieves the current local configuration parameters. * @return the active ConfigDTO instance

    • applyConfig

      public void applyConfig(LcrMeter meter)
      Transmits and applies the current configuration sequence to the LCR meter hardware with necessary stabilization delays. * @param meter the target LCR meter hardware controller instance
